name: @trek/root

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=shared && concurrently --names shared,server,client "npm run build:watch --workspace=shared" "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=shared && npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:coverage --workspace=server && npm run test:coverage --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=shared && npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=client
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=shared && npm run format --workspace=server && npm run format --workspace=client
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --workspace=shared && npm run format:check --workspace=server && npm run format:check --workspace=client

comment:scarfSettings: swagger-ui-dist ships @scarf/scarf install-time analytics; TREK sends no telemetry, so it stays off.
comment:overrides: Force a single React 19 across the workspace so the test renderer (@testing-library/react) and the app share one react-dom.
